title: Better Fire
body:
![The player is in a desert and is on fire with the 'Better Fire' resource pack enabled](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fd60910281610d7d73db5eefac5e04efbd8f7bb0.png)

## Better Fire
- Lower and transparent fire 🔥
- Enhances visibility 👁️
- Doesn't cover half of the screen 🖥️
- Great for PvP or just regular gameplay ⚔️
